selections.name: Gatwick
selections.reason: Resuming for top yard (Price/Kent Jnr). Ran a solid 3rd on debut and sets up well here.

selections.name: Brass In Pocket
selections.reason: Came home strongly from last on the turn to grab 3rd on debut. Will be hard to hold out.

selections.name: Beau Strada
selections.reason: Improved to finish 2nd last start. Fitter fourth-up and can be competitive.

selections.name: Bletchingly's Girl
selections.reason: Debutant from the Hayes yard. Runner-up in a recent jump-out and draws well.

danger_horse.name: Second Witness
danger_horse.reason: First starter for Stokes yard, runner-up in a jump-out. Respect any market support.

selections.name: Venatrix
selections.reason: Ran a strong 2nd on debut at Mornington. Has plenty of improvement to come and looks a major player.

selections.name: Recycle King
selections.reason: Finished 2nd last start at Ararat. Fitter now and making headway.

selections.name: Inner Thoughts
selections.reason: Raced on the speed and boxed on well for 2nd last start. Should be in the finish.

selections.name: Ulfberht
selections.reason: First starter for Griffiths yard. Won a recent jump-out and expected to run well.

danger_horse.name: Donebravo
danger_horse.reason: Can improve third-up after a fair 5th last start.

selections.name: Sacre Bleu
selections.reason: Made good ground for 2nd last start at Cranbourne. Looks ready to break through.

selections.name: Corviglia (NZ)
selections.reason: Finished 4th last start but came home strongly. Can improve in this field.

selections.name: Golden Mask
selections.reason: Consistent form with a 2nd and 4th recently. Deserves another chance.

selections.name: Cheron Finale
selections.reason: Ran 5th last start on rain-affected going. Each-way chance on best form.

selections.name: Chronic
selections.reason: Finished 2nd last start at this track. Fitter now and ready to peak third-up.

selections.name: Fenestella
selections.reason: Resuming. Finished 3rd last prep and has ability. Should take some beating.

selections.name: Hellacious
selections.reason: Ran 5th last start. Possible improver in this lineup.

selections.name: Kindamagic
selections.reason: Resuming after a spell. Has shown glimpses of ability and can figure.

selections.name: Join The Que
selections.reason: Dominant 7.5 length winner last start at Stawell. Hard to beat if he repeats that effort.

selections.name: Lowestoft
selections.reason: Scored a solid 3.5 length win at this track last start. Looks a strong danger.

selections.name: Stella Cantante
selections.reason: Consistent mare who ran 3rd last start. Place chance again.

selections.name: Hollerasaurous
selections.reason: Disappointed last start but won on debut. Can bounce back.

danger_horse.name: Crystanado
danger_horse.reason: Minor hope based on a solid 2nd two starts back.

selections.name: Killiana
selections.reason: Resuming for the Hayes yard. Won well on debut and ran 2nd in a Gold Strike. Very well placed here.

selections.name: Buvelot
selections.reason: Chasing a hat-trick after two solid wins. Harder here but up to the task.

selections.name: Intriguing State
selections.reason: Ran 3rd last start at this track. Strips fitter and is worth including.

selections.name: Mafee
selections.reason: Finished 4th last start. Consistent type who can feature in the exotics.

selections.name: Sun Devil
selections.reason: Won well at Kyneton last start as favourite. Progressive type who can make it two in a row.

selections.name: Struggle Street
selections.reason: Consistent mare who ran 3rd last start and won prior. Will take catching.

selections.name: Duel Venture
selections.reason: Finished 3rd last start at Cranbourne. One of the top chances.

selections.name: Bohemian Angel
selections.reason: Form is hard to fault with a recent 4th and a win prior. Can figure.

danger_horse.name: Flower Gallery
danger_horse.reason: Won last start at Balnarring. Could surprise at odds.

selections.name: High Tempo (NZ)
selections.reason: Won by a nose at this track last start. Leading hope again.

selections.name: Strike First
selections.reason: Won last start at Cranbourne. Can go right on with the job now.

selections.name: It's All Calm
selections.reason: Ran 2nd last start at Stawell. In the mix again.

selections.name: Grand Sage
selections.reason: Finished 3rd at this track last start. Solid each-way prospect.

danger_horse.name: Aristonous (FR)
danger_horse.reason: Classy gelding returning from a spell. Don't underestimate.
